contract.closed_form_scope: EIG for one binary candidate under the paper's weighted Hamming GP and Gaussian-noise assumptions
acceptance: Efficient and explicit EIG agree to <=1e-7 for at least p=3..9 and three deterministic seeds.
The efficient route completes p=101 without allocating any 2^p object.
Executable operation counts for the dominant ESP route have log-log slope in [3.5, 4.35].
Explicit-route modeled memory is exponential in p with R^2 >=0.90.
A 0.1% output corruption is rejected by the same tolerance.
